idea-plugin.name: Debug MCP
idea-plugin.description:
Control IntelliJ IDEA with AI coding assistants like Claude Code via the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

The plugin starts a local MCP server (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP on port 63820) that exposes 37 tools across 8 API groups:

  • Debugger — set/remove breakpoints, start/stop sessions, step over/into/out, inspect variables, evaluate expressions, navigate stack frames
  • Build — incremental build or full rebuild, read compiler errors and warnings
  • Tests — run JUnit/TestNG tests by class or method, collect results with stack traces
  • Files & Editor — read files, list directories, glob search, full-text search, open files in editor at a specific line
  • PSI (Code Structure) — find classes, inspect their fields and methods, find all usages, get file structure with signatures and line numbers
  • Inspections — surface IDE static-analysis warnings (errors / warnings / weak warnings) for any open file
  • Git — git blame with line range, commit log, diffs by file or commit
  • Run Configurations — list, create, and update Application / JUnit run configs

Claude Code uses its built-in Bash tool to call the server via curl — no extra MCP client setup needed. Just add a short block to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md and Claude will discover all tools automatically.

Example workflows:

  • Set a breakpoint, launch a debug session, inspect variables, find the bug — autonomously
  • Build → read errors → patch code → rebuild until clean
  • Run tests → read failures → fix → repeat until green
  • Explore an unfamiliar codebase: find classes, trace usages, read relevant files
  • Audit code quality: get IDE inspections, fix all warnings
  • Git blame a suspicious line and read the commit that introduced it

See the GitHub repository for setup instructions and full tool reference.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2 — Bug fixes

  • set_breakpoint — fixed: now accepts relative paths (resolved against project root via VfsUtil)
  • get_file_structure — fixed: replaced reflection-based Kotlin PSI traversal with PsiShortNamesCache API, compatible with Kotlin K2 compiler mode

1.0.1 — Compatibility fix

  • Fixed compatibility with IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1 (IC-251)
  • Replaced internal XLineBreakpointImpl with public XLineBreakpoint API
  • Declared JUnit plugin dependency explicitly
  • Added Kotlin K2 plugin mode support

1.0.0 — Initial release

  • Debugger API — breakpoints, session control, step commands, variable inspection, expression evaluation, stack frame navigation
  • Build API — incremental Make / full Rebuild, compiler error reader
  • Test Runner API — run JUnit/TestNG tests, collect per-test results with stack traces
  • File/Editor API — read files, list directories, glob and full-text search, open files in editor
  • PSI API — find classes, find usages, get file structure
  • Inspections API — surface IDE static-analysis warnings by severity
  • Git API — git blame, log, diff
  • Run Config API — create and update Application/JUnit run configurations
